_patch_meta.scope: JD CTL D-Series adds/fixes + ROC policy corrections + invalid record tombstones
_patch_meta.author: Claude Code — diagnostic-only pass, OEM-sourced
_patch_meta.apply_script_note: Do not apply until reviewed. Use patch_ctl_v1_28.py or equivalent.
sources: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP (deere.com)
John Deere 325G OEM spec sheet DKAGCTL325 rev 24-03 (deere.com)
John Deere 331G OEM spec sheet DKAGCTL331 rev 22-10 (deere.com)
John Deere 333G OEM spec sheet DKAGCTL333 rev 22-10 (deere.com)
John Deere CT-Series CTL brochure DKACTLCWP rev 09-06 (deere.com)
policy_notes: MTM ROC normalization: rated_operating_capacity_lbs = OEM-published 50% of tipping load value. All OEM PDFs publish both 35% and 50% values explicitly; 50% values used directly, no back-calculation.
tipping_load_lbs always reflects OEM-published full tipping load; unchanged in ROC-only fixes.
No values inferred. Every change traces to a published OEM number from a primary Deere source.

tombstones.reason: John Deere 322D is a wheeled skid steer (300-Series SSL), not a CTL. OEM D-Series CTL brochure lists exactly four CTL models: 319D, 323D, 329D, 333D. In JD's naming convention, the middle digit '2' denotes wheeled (SSL) and '3' denotes tracked (CTL); the 322D is the wheeled analogue of the 323D. This record was added to the CTL registry in error via Excel market volume expansion.
tombstones.source: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP — lineup confirmed as 319D/323D/329D/333D only
notes_to_add: [jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] TOMBSTONED: John Deere 322D is a wheeled skid steer, not a CTL. OEM D-Series CTL brochure confirms the D-Series CTL lineup is 319D, 323D, 329D, 333D only. Record retained as tombstone to prevent future re-stubbing.
tombstones.alias_redirect: If SSL registry is missing a 322D entry, add it there as a separate task.

tombstones.reason: No production John Deere 335G CTL exists. JD G-Series CTL lineup is: 317G, 319G, 325G, 331G, 333G. The 333G successor in the large-frame slot is the 335 P-Tier (introduced ~2024), which JD designated '335' not '335G'. JD skipped the 335G generation entirely. The correct successor model is jd_335_p_tier already in the registry.
tombstones.source: John Deere G-Series CTL OEM spec sheets confirm G-Series ends at 333G; JD 335 launched as P-Tier designation
notes_to_add: [jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] TOMBSTONED: No production John Deere 335G CTL exists. Successor model is the 335 P-Tier (see jd_335_p_tier). JD G-Series lineup ends at 333G. Record retained as tombstone to prevent future re-stubbing.
If market listings appear tagged '335G', add alias_hint '335G' to jd_335_p_tier.

adds.reason: 319D is a production D-Series CTL missing from the registry. OEM D-Series brochure confirms it as the small-frame CTL in the D-Series lineup alongside 323D/329D/333D.
adds.source: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP

source_refs: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP (deere.com)
notes: John Deere 319D — D-Series compact track loader. Small-frame, Tier 4 Interim variant. Shares PowerTech E 4024HT engine with 323D but at lower output.
Engine: JD PowerTech E 4024HT, 4-cyl turbocharged, 2.4L (149 cu in).
rated_operating_capacity_lbs = 2800 lb (50% of 5600 lb tipping load per MTM policy). OEM brochure publishes both 35% and 50% values; 50% stored here.
width_over_tires_in = 71.7in using 320mm (12.6in) standard track. OEM D-Series standard track for small-frame.
High-flow NOT available on 319D per OEM spec table (shown as dash). 2-speed NOT available on 319D per OEM spec table (shown as dash). 319D is the only D-Series CTL without these options.
aux_flow_high_gpm null — high-flow not available on this model (OEM: not offered).
travel_speed_low_mph null — single-speed transmission only on 319D.

years_supported 2007-2014 spans full D-Series production window (Tier 3 and Tier 4 Interim variants); OEM brochure sourced is Tier 4 Interim spec. Confirm year range against serial number records if precision required.
[jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] New production record. Source: JD D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP.

adds.reason: 329D is a production D-Series CTL missing from the registry. OEM D-Series brochure confirms it as the large-frame CTL in the D-Series lineup alongside 319D/323D/333D.
adds.source: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP

source_refs: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP (deere.com)
notes: John Deere 329D — D-Series compact track loader. Large-frame, sister model to 333D with lower HP output. Shares PowerTech E 5030HT 5-cyl engine platform with 333D.
Engine: JD PowerTech E 5030HT, 5-cyl turbocharged, 3.0L (186 cu in).
rated_operating_capacity_lbs = 4150 lb (50% of 8300 lb tipping load per MTM policy). OEM brochure publishes both 35% and 50% values; 50% stored here.
width_over_tires_in = 78.7in using 400mm (15.7in) standard track. OEM D-Series standard track for large-frame.
travel_speed values reflect 2-speed transmission: high = 7.8 mph, low = 5.3 mph. Single-speed also available (6.2 mph).
aux_flow_high_gpm = 33.0 (125 L/min total) per OEM; package_dependent — confirm on unit record.
years_supported 2007-2014 spans full D-Series production window. Confirm precise range against serial number records if needed.
[jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] New production record. Source: JD D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP.

updates.reason: Multiple OEM corrections: ROC policy violation (35% stored instead of 50%), width error (400mm optional track stored as standard instead of 320mm standard track), plus null fields filled from D-Series OEM brochure.
updates.source: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP

specs.rated_operating_capacity_lbs.reason: ROC policy: registry stored OEM 35% value (2295 lb). OEM brochure explicitly publishes 50% value as 3600 lb. MTM policy = store 50%.

specs.width_over_tires_in.reason: Width error: prior note claimed '400mm standard track' but OEM D-Series specifies 320mm (12.6in) as standard for 323D. 400mm is optional. 320mm = 71.7in.

specs.aux_flow_high_gpm.reason: OEM confirms: high-flow option provides 29 GPM (110 L/min total) on 323D.

specs.travel_speed_low_mph.reason: OEM D-Series spec table: 2-speed transmission low = 5.5 mph on 323D. 2-speed is optional (not standard). Only populated for 2-speed equipped units.

specs.fuel_capacity_gal.reason: OEM: 70.0L = 18.49 gal. 18.5 is the correct rounded value. Prior 19.0 was a rounding error.

feature_flags.two_speed_available.reason: 2-speed IS available as an option on 323D per OEM. Prior false was incorrect.

field_confidence.rated_operating_capacit.reason: Remains HIGH; value corrected to OEM 50%.

field_confidence.width_over_tires_in.reason: Remains HIGH; value corrected to 320mm standard track.

notes_to_replace: REPLACE: 'width_over_tires_in = 75.2in using 15.8in (400mm) standard track per registry Deere track width rule.'

WITH: 'width_over_tires_in = 71.7in using 320mm (12.6in) standard track per OEM D-Series brochure DKADCTLCWP. 400mm is optional track — prior record incorrectly stored the optional track width as standard.'
notes_to_add: [jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] ROC corrected 2295 → 3600: registry stored 35% OEM value; corrected to OEM-published 50% value (MTM policy). OEM brochure DKADCTLCWP explicitly lists both: 35% = 2295 lb, 50% = 3600 lb.
[jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] Width corrected 75.2 → 71.7in: OEM standard track is 320mm (71.7in). Prior note was wrong to claim 400mm as standard.

[jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] aux_flow_high_gpm filled: 29.0 GPM (110 L/min) per OEM. feature_flags.two_speed_available corrected false → true (2-speed optional). travel_speed_low_mph filled: 5.5 mph (2-speed low). fuel_capacity_gal corrected 19.0 → 18.5 (70.0L). dump_height_in/dump_reach_in filled from OEM.

updates.reason: Promote coverage_stub to production; fill all null OEM fields from D-Series brochure; correct ROC (35% stored), operating weight, and width from OEM.
updates.source: John Deere D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP

specs.engine_model.reason: Normalize: drop 'JD' prefix. Convention across all other JD records.

specs.rated_operating_capacity_lbs.reason: ROC policy: 3300 lb is OEM 35% value. MTM policy = 50%. OEM tipping = 9425 lb; 50% = 4725 lb (per OEM D-Series brochure published value).

specs.operating_weight_lbs.reason: OEM D-Series: 333D operating weight with 450mm standard track = 11,100 lb. Prior 10130 does not appear in OEM documentation — likely sourced from low-quality aggregator. 11100 is the correct 450mm std track value per OEM brochure.

specs.width_over_tires_in.reason: OEM D-Series: 333D standard track is 450mm (17.7in) = 80.7in total width. Prior 78.7 reflects 400mm optional track — wrong standard.

Engine: JD PowerTech E 5030HT, 5-cyl turbocharged, 3.0L (186 cu in), Tier 3.
rated_operating_capacity_lbs = 4725 lb (50% of 9425 lb tipping load per MTM policy). OEM brochure publishes 50% value; 35% OEM value was 3300 lb (prior stored value).
operating_weight_lbs = 11100 lb with 450mm standard track per OEM D-Series brochure. Prior value 10130 lb not traceable to OEM source — likely aggregator error.
width_over_tires_in = 80.7in using 450mm (17.7in) standard track per OEM D-Series brochure. Prior 78.7in reflected 400mm optional track.
bucket_hinge_pin_height_in = 126.0in (3.20m) at full lift per OEM.
travel_speed values: high = 7.8 mph, low = 5.3 mph (2-speed transmission standard on 333D).
aux_flow_high_gpm = 34.0 GPM (129 L/min) per OEM; package_dependent — confirm on unit record.
years_supported 2007-2014 spans full D-Series production window. Confirm precise range if needed.

[jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] Promoted from coverage_stub to production. All fields OEM-sourced from JD D-Series CTL brochure DKADCTLCWP. ROC corrected 3300 → 4725 (35% → 50% MTM policy). Weight corrected 10130 → 11100. Width corrected 78.7 → 80.7.

updates.reason: Two fixes: (1) ROC policy violation — registry stores OEM 35% value (2200 lb); (2) Width error — registry stores optional 400mm track width (75.0in) instead of standard 320mm track width (71.7in).
updates.source: John Deere CT-Series CTL brochure DKACTLCWP rev 09-06 (deere.com)

specs.rated_operating_capacity_lbs.reason: OEM CT-Series brochure explicitly states: 'CT322: 2,200-lb SAE ROC @ 35% of tipping load / 3,200-lb SAE ROC @ 50% of tipping load'. 2200 lb stored in error; MTM policy = 50% = 3200 lb. Tipping load 6400 lb unchanged.

specs.width_over_tires_in.reason: Width error: prior note claimed 'small frame = 15.8in/400mm track' but OEM CT-Series standard for CT322 is 320mm (12.6in) = 71.7in. 400mm is optional. Same bug class as jd_323d.

WITH: 'width_over_tires_in = 71.7in using 320mm (12.6in) standard track per OEM CT-Series brochure DKACTLCWP. 400mm is optional track — prior note was incorrect.'

specs.rated_operating_capacity_lbs.reason: OEM CT-Series brochure explicitly states: 'CT332: 3,200-lb SAE ROC @ 35% of tipping load / 4,600-lb SAE ROC @ 50% of tipping load'. 3200 lb stored in error; MTM policy = 50% = 4600 lb. Tipping load 9200 lb unchanged. Verify: 9200 * 0.50 = 4600 — exact match.

notes_to_add: [jd_ctl_oem_patch 2026-04-26] ROC corrected 3200 → 4600: OEM CT-Series brochure explicitly states both values. 3200 lb = 35% OEM convention (stored in error); 4600 lb = 50% MTM policy. Tipping load 9200 lb unchanged.

before_apply: Verify ROC direction: all 6 ROC updates increase the value (35% → 50%). If any entry shows a decrease, reject.
Verify tipping_load_lbs is NOT changed in any ROC-only fix (325G, 331G, 333G, CT322, CT332).
Verify 323D width: 71.7 = 320mm track (correct for small-frame D-Series). Confirm with team that 320mm is standard.
Verify 333D operating weight: prior 10130 had no OEM provenance. New 11100 is OEM. Accept 11100.
Verify 333D ROC: 4725 against tipping 9425 — 4725/9425 = 50.1%. Accept (OEM-published rounding).
Confirm tombstone approach (not hard-delete) for jd_322d and jd_335g — records remain in registry with status=invalid_not_a_ctl, registry_tier=tombstone.
Check that jd_335_p_tier is in good shape before tombstoning jd_335g (it is in registry as coverage_stub).
Run scorer validation after apply to confirm no regressions on 323D/333D spec sheets.
